question_text: Which factor does NOT affect the size of a moment?

options.label: A
options.text: The size of the force applied

options.label: D
options.text: The direction the force is applied

explanation: A moment (or turning effect) depends on two things: the size of the force applied and how far from the pivot the force is applied. The direction of the force also matters. The colour of the lever is a physical property that has no effect on the turning effect produced. This question tests understanding of which variables actually affect moments.
